title: The Fordbidden Academy
overview: After being swept away by a magic sword to an unknown yet beautiful world, Yui finds herself in the company of gods with a sacred order bestowed upon her from Zeus himself: strengthen the bonds between man and their deities.

title: Beautiful Shackles
overview: Yui finds out the reasons why herself and her godly classmates have been transported to a school in the skies. In order to get home, they must sufficiently strengthen the bond between man and god by the time they are ready to graduate.

title: Sea Breeze Conflict
overview: Yui and Appolon, desperate to get the delinquent gods to attend school, devise a plan to show them the fun side of school life.

title: The Curse of Hades
overview: The newly formed student council decides to start joining after school activities...all except Hades. With his love of the stars, Yui suggests he join the Astronomy Club, but he coldly refuses. Yui is determined to find out why.

title: The Unforgivable Heart
overview: Takeru, otherwise known as the god Susanoo, is the last hold out yet to engage in any extracurricular activities. With their graduation hanging in the balance, Yui must duel with Takeru to see whether or not he will join a club.

title: The Moonlight's Feelings
overview: Tsukito agrees to prepare a moon viewing for Yui and the rest of the gods. However, overworking himself might undo all of his efforts.

title: Promise of the Frozen Wastes
overview: The seasons suddenly turn, and the students decide to hold a Christmas event. Balder becomes upset after finding out he has to work apart from Yui.

title: The Solitude of Light
overview: Tensions flare at the Christmas market, where Loki and Balder face off in front of Yui.

title: Dark Prison of Scattered Flowers
overview: The academy has been open for six month now and with exams around the corner, Yui must prepare.

title: Lovely and Ephemeral
overview: Yui and her friends put on a version of cinderalla, which turns out nothing like the original thanks to two mischevious gods...

title: Chains of Fate
overview: While Apollon and Yui make sure that Balder is okay after he passes out, they hear through the grapevine that the gods have nothing good planned for Balder.

title: Eternal Separation
overview: Into the dark abyss of the sea goes Balder. Deeper and deeper he plunges into the nothingness all for the benefit of the world. With Loki right behind him, will the light shine through?
